hours_summary: Monday to Friday 10 AM to 6 PM, Saturday 9 AM to 5 PM, closed Sunday.

policies.cancellation: Please cancel or reschedule at least 24 hours in advance.
policies.walkins: Walk-ins are welcome based on availability.
policies.late: If you are more than 10 minutes late, we may need to move your appointment to the next available slot.

fallback.capture_message: I can take your name and callback number and have someone from Downtown Demo Barbershop call you back.
